learned_lessons: {'param': 'CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD', 'value': 0.58, 'reason': 'Adjusting the confidence threshold will help in balancing the risk premium and reward.'}

Commander: The root cause is that the scanner spike during the scan timeout caused a large deviation in the score. This led to an excessive risk premium for the algorithm. The high confidence level of 0.58 indicates the need to tighten or expand risk
